checked_paths: all audited dependency repos searched for the listed symbols
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: No local audited repo contains an SPC registry service that watches EXECUTOR_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS, applies the new ExecutorRegistry default address, or ignores old TeeDA/TEE service configuration by using the ExecutorRegistry log source.
related_but_insufficient_code: ritual-spc-verification/src/types.rs still defines ExecutorRegistry and deactivate_executor, but it is only an in-memory map and has no log-watching service.
ritual-tee-registry-reader reads TEEServiceRegistry storage via TEE_SERVICE_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS; it does not decode ExecutorRegistry event logs.

ritual-reth-nodebuilder-internal/crates/node/src/executor.rs syncs registry state from storage before execution but uses TEE_SERVICE_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS and read_all_executors, not ExecutorRegistry event receipts.

notes: Confirmed by exact symbol searches across all audited local repos and by reading the current SPC/TEE registry code paths.
rationale: The primary diff renames service semantics from TeeDA to ExecutorRegistry and changes configuration from TEEDA_CONTRACT_ADDRESS to EXECUTOR_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS with a new default. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: The SPC verification registry service must monitor the ExecutorRegistry contract address, configured by EXECUTOR_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS with the new default address, and ignore old TeeDA-specific configuration and event naming.
suggested_falsification_tests: Set EXECUTOR_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS to a test address, emit supported registry events from that address and from the old TeeDA address, and assert only events from the configured ExecutorRegistry address mutate the in-memory executor registry.
summary: ExecutorRegistry log-service monitoring is absent; local code still uses TEE service registry storage/config.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Set EXECUTOR_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS to a test contract and emit ExecutorRegistry logs; the current local code has no service/log path expected to consume them.
title: Registry service watches ExecutorRegistry contract
